Featured Project

VaporLogicAI

A control-focused concept for improving corrugated board flatness with smarter zone-based spray control.

WorkEngineeringDesign
Back Home

Overview

The VaporLogic is an advanced water spraying system designed to enhance the quality of corrugated paper during the manufacturing process. By utilizing atomizing nozzles, the system delivers a fine, even spray that effectively corrects warpage, ensuring superior product quality. Each nozzle is individually controlled, allowing for precise tuning of both water and air supply to meet the specific needs of each zone, with the added capability of turning off outer nozzles for smaller paper widths. Additionally, the system features self-cleaning 'clean-out' needles that prevent dripping and maintain nozzle efficiency by clearing the orifice with every closing action. Leveraging a combination of sensors, PID controllers, and AI, VaporLogic dynamically adjusts the water and air mixture in real-time, optimizing the application process to produce a consistently straight and high-quality board.
